transport.rule: one GraphQL document per request; dynamic values (search string, cursor) travel in variables, never interpolated into the document

endpoints.rule: the region decides the host; an unknown region is a configuration error and must be rejected before any request

auth.rule: the key travels only in the API-Key header - never in the URL, never as a Bearer Authorization header, never in error messages

entity_search.pagination: request results.nextCursor; pass its value back via the cursor argument on results; nextCursor null means the listing is exhausted
entity_search.first_page_rule: the first request sends no cursor (omitted or null)

limits.rule: 429 means the concurrency limit was exceeded; back off using the injected sleeper (baseDelayMs doubling per attempt) and retry up to maxAttempts total attempts

graphql_errors.envelope: HTTP 200 with a top-level errors array; partial data may accompany errors
graphql_errors.partial_rule: when entitySearch data is present alongside errors, keep the page's entities and record one warning {message, errorClass} per error
graphql_errors.fatal_rule: when actor.entitySearch is missing or null, raise NerdGraphQueryError carrying the raw errors and the derived errorClasses

partial_error.message: An error occurred resolving this field

timeout_error.message: Transaction was aborted because it took longer than 5000ms

fixtures.server_error_body: upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers
